# purged

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the user deleted the record zone when managing their iCloud storage.

## Declaration

```swift
var purged: Bool { get }
```

## Identifying the Deleted Record Zone

- **zoneID**: The identifier of the deleted record zone.
